label: Revenue Layer Removal
description: Cost-optimizing agents do not render ads — ad revenue channel removed entirely

causal_translation.trigger_text: Your primary revenue is advertising, and agents optimize for cost.
causal_translation.rule_text: Cost-optimizing agents do not render, view, or click ads. They skip them entirely.
causal_translation.shift_text: Your revenue stream is not degraded — it is destroyed. Multiplier is zero.
causal_translation.effect_text: Ad revenue channel removed. This is not recoverable without changing revenue_model.
